strengths: Extensive production experience with event-driven systems and distributed architectures (Dunnhumby, GISCollective)
Strong background in backend development, microservices, and real-time data processing (Node.js, TypeScript, AWS, MongoDB)
Proven ability to scale engineering teams and implement disciplined development practices (Optilyz, RIDE Capital)
concerns: Limited direct experience with agentic AI systems in production (current role includes MCP development but not full agent frameworks)
No explicit mention of fintech infrastructure, credit systems, or regulated environments in career history
Lacks demonstrated expertise in foundation-model selection, fine-tuning, or evaluation methodology required for CTO role
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed-systems and backend expertise with scale-up experience, but lacks direct production experience with agentic AI systems and fintech-regulated environments required for this CTO role. His current work on MCP frameworks is promising but not sufficient to meet the depth of requirements for agentic AI architecture and fintech integration at this leadership level.
